shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' | head -80 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && (sed -n '1,220p' package.json 2>/dev/null || true) && printf '\\n--- next docs ---\\n' && (test -d node_modules/next/dist/docs && find node_modules/next/dist/docs -maxdepth 2 -type f | head -80 || true)"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,260p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- layout ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' app/layout.tsx && printf '\\n--- db ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' lib/db.js"

/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n -i "revalidatetag|updateTag|cacheTag|unstable_cache|server action|form action|use cache|revalidate" node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app node_modules/next/dist/docs/02-pages | head -160'
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- app/page.tsx app/layout.tsx app/styles.css next.config.ts tsconfig.json 2>/dev/null || true && git status --short 2>/dev/null || true'
/bin/bash -lc 'curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | rg -o "Product catalog|Sync latest catalog|Laptop|Catalog data is served"'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
